question: What scholarships are available at LPU?
answer: LPU offers: 1) LPUNEST Merit Scholarship — 10% to 100% tuition fee waiver based on entrance score. 2) Academic Excellence Scholarship — for students with 95%+ in 12th. 3) Sports Scholarship — for national/state level athletes. 4) Armed Forces Scholarship — for children of defence personnel. 5) PM Scholarship Scheme. Check full list at lpu.in/scholarships.
